title: lithocarpus castellarnauianus
intro: Lithocarpus castellarnauianus, also known as the Castellarnau's Lithocarpus or Castellarnau's Bechtel's Lithocarpus, is a species of plant in the family Fagaceae, commonly referred to as an evergreen tree with edible nuts. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus castellarnauianus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's nuts and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed for their medicinal properties.
